2604.19544.title: DT2IT-MRM: Debiased Preference Construction and Iterative Training for Multimodal Reward Modeling
2604.19544.paper_summary: Multimodal reward models (MRMs) play a crucial role in aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with human preferences. Training a good MRM requires high-quality multimodal preference data. However, existing preference datasets face three key challenges: lack of granularity in preference strength, textual style bias, and unreliable preference signals. Besides, existing open-source multimodal preference datasets suffer from substantial noise, yet there is a lack of effective and scalable curation methods to enhance their quality. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{DT2IT-MRM}, which integrates a \textbf{D}ebiased preference construction pipeline, a novel reformulation of text-to-image (\textbf{T2I}) preference data, and an \textbf{I}terative \textbf{T}raining framework that curates existing multimodal preference datasets for \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{R}eward \textbf{M}odeling. Our experimental results show that DT2IT-MRM achieves new \textbf{state-of-the-art} overall performance on three major benchmarks: VL-RewardBench, Multimodal RewardBench, and MM-RLHF-RewardBench.
2604.19544.paper_summary_zh: 多模態獎勵模型（MRMs）在使多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）與人類偏好對齊方面扮演著關鍵角色。訓練一個良好的MRM需要高質量的多模態偏好數據。然而，現有的偏好數據集面臨三個主要挑戰：偏好強度缺乏細緻度、文本風格偏見以及不可靠的偏好信號。此外，現有的開源多模態偏好數據集存在大量噪音，但缺乏有效且可擴展的策展方法來提升其質量。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了\textbf{DT2IT-MRM}，它整合了一個\textbf{去偏見}的偏好構建管道、一種新穎的文本到圖像（\textbf{T2I}）偏好數據重新表述，以及一個\textbf{迭代}的\textbf{訓練}框架，用於策展現有的多模態偏好數據集以進行\textbf{多模態}獎勵\textbf{建模}。我們的實驗結果顯示，DT2IT-MRM在三個主要基準上達到了新的\textbf{最先進}的整體性能：VL-RewardBench、多模態RewardBench和MM-RLHF-RewardBench。
2604.19544.author: Zhihong Zhang et.al.
2604.19544.authors: Zhihong Zhang, Jie Zhao, Xiaojian Huang, Jin Xu, Zhuodong Luo, Xin Liu, Jiansheng Wei, Xuejin Chen
